main_menu.title: Main menu. Please choose a section:

about.text:
👨‍💻 *Abduvaliev Abdubosit*

📍 Location: Tashkent
⏳ Experience: 4+ years
💼 Role: Graphic & Web Designer

I create modern and creative design solutions for brands. I can help with logos, banners, web design, and much more.

services.title:
🎨 *Services*

Choose a service to learn more:

logo.title: 🖋 Logo Design
logo.text:
🖋 *Logo Design*

I create professional logos — the face of your brand.

✅ Unique concept
✅ Vector format (AI, EPS, SVG)
✅ PNG and PDF versions
✅ 3 concept options
✅ Unlimited revisions

⏱ Turnaround: 3–5 days
💰 Price: from $50

smm.title: 📱 SMM Design
smm.text:
📱 *Social Media Design*

Professional content design for Instagram, Telegram, Facebook.

✅ Posts, stories, highlight covers
✅ Matched to your brand style
✅ Ready-to-use template pack
✅ Fast delivery

⏱ Turnaround: 1–2 days
💰 Price: from $20

web.title: 🌐 Web Design
web.text:
🌐 *Web Design*

Modern and user-friendly website designs.

✅ UI/UX design
✅ Figma prototype
✅ Responsive (mobile-ready)
✅ Modern trends

⏱ Turnaround: 5–10 days
💰 Price: from $100

poster.title: 🎭 Poster & Banner
poster.text:
🎭 *Poster & Banner Design*

Professional designs for events and advertising.

✅ Print and digital formats
✅ High-quality export
✅ Any size
✅ Fast execution

⏱ Turnaround: 1–2 days
💰 Price: from $15

lead.start:
📝 Leave a Request

I'll ask you a few questions. Type /cancel at any time to stop.
lead.ask_design:

_(e.g. logo, banner, SMM post, etc.)_
